title: DeltaLake Logical error: 'Header does not match write schema. Expected: c0, got: c0.c1'
description:
### Describe the bug
This issue happens due to the Nested type.
### How to reproduce
Create the table with [spark.py](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/22467906/spark.py). Then in ClickHouse run:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 Nested(c1 Int32)) ENGINE = DeltaLakeLocal(local, format = 'Parquet', path = '/var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/lakehouses/spark_catalog/test/t0');
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c0.c1) SELECT c1 FROM generateRandom('c1 Array(Int32)', 1804311225537264571, 1, 9) LIMIT 1; --Logical error
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace


bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (c0_c1 INTEGER, c0_c2 TEXT);
CREATE TABLE t2 (id INTEGER, data_c1 INTEGER, data_c2 REAL);

INSERT INTO t2 (id, data_c1, data_c2) SELECT number, number * 1.5 FROM (SELECT 0 AS number UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9);
SELECT id, data_c1 FROM t2 WHERE id > 5;
key_bug_features: Nested type schema mismatch during DeltaLake write operation
